channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Tekken! Cartoon shorts series announced
item.content:encoded:
• Anime

A series of short cartoons featuring popular Tekken characters.

Bandai Namco has announced Tekken! Cartoon, a series of short cartoons featuring popular characters from the Tekken series.

The teaser text reads: “Will this fight end in a draw? Your favorite Tekken characters are coming out of the ring and into the cartoon world! Keep an eye on our socials for more news about the Tekken! Cartoon.”

The staff includes:

  • Character Designer and Animator: Amehiro
  • Music and Sound Designer: in the blue shirt
  • Cast: Tsubasa Tobinaga
  • Brand Supervisor: Tekken Project
  • Planner: Masateru Miyamoto
  • Creative Director / Planner: Syohei Hashimoto
  • Creative Director / Planner: Hironori Hasegawa
  • Business Producer: Mihoko Nakashima
  • Director: Sohta Ozawa (NERD)
  • Director of Photography: Yuta Kakei
  • 1st Assistant Camera: Yuki Urakami
  • 2nd Assistant Camera: Shingo Naramura
  • Lighting Director: Kazuya Imose
  • Lighting Assistant: Ko Sato / Shota Yamanaka
  • Production Designer: Shiho Onuma
  • Art Assistant: Tomohiro Hirota
  • Digital Imaging Technician: Seiji Uchida
  • Hair and Make-up: Hanako Kaiya
  • Stylist: Minoru Sugahara
  • Offline Editor: Asuka Mochizuki
  • Colorist: Elder Zulpukarov (TREE Digital Studio)
  • Online Editor: Ryunosuke Hayashi
  • Sound Mixer: Ken Takahashi
  • Character Designer and Animator: Amehiro
  • Music and Sound Designer: in the blue shirt
  • Designer: Shimpei Umeda
  • Casting: Nozomi Yabuki (FORMEN)
  • Assistant Director: Sora Kanesaki
  • Production Manager: Numanao
  • Production Assistant: Ryoma Saito / Rio Toyoshima
  • Business Producer: Asumi Nishiki (NERD)
  • Producer: Minami Komatsu (NERD)

Watch the teaser trailer below.

Tekken! Cartoon Teaser Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/tekken-cartoon-shorts-series-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Easy Delivery Co. ‘EasyCo EasyRally’ update launches July 6
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Smartphone
  • Switch
  • Xbox Series

An alternate, re-imagined version of the game.

Publisher Oro Interactive and developer Sam C will release a free update for Easy Delivery Co. on July 6, which adds the “EasyCo EasyRally” game mode—an alternate, re-imagined version of the game featuring new music by Sohaoying.

Easy Delivery Co. is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch, PC via Steam, iOS via App Store, and Android via Google Play.

Watch a new trailer below.

“EasyCo EasyRally” Update Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/easy-delivery-co-easyco-easyrally-update-launches-july-6
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Wuthering Waves version 3.5 update ‘Blade of Past Resounds, Lingering Dream Hymns’ launches July 10 alongside Xbox Series version
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Smartphone
  • Xbox Series

Time fleets over the fort like a kite in the wind...

Kuro Games will release the version 3.5 update for free-to-play open-world action RPG Wuthering Waves, dubbed “Blade of Past Resounds, Lingering Dream Hymns,” on July 10 alongside the Xbox Series version of the game, the developer announced.

Here is an overview of the update, via Kuro Games:

  • New Main Quests
    • Chapter IV Act I The Wind Before the Storm
    • Chapter IV Act II Xuanling Sings, Storm Quelled
    • Chapter IV Segue The Chant of Unseen Ties
  • New Area
    • Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang
  • New Permanent Event
    • Mingshen Notices
  • Optimizations
    • Gameplay Experience Optimization
      • Added support for voice pack language individualization. You can assign a different Voice-Over Language to each Resonator. This customization setting is only effective for non-story voicelines in order to maintain a consistent story experience.
      • Refined the story Autoplay feature. Semi-Auto Mode and Full Auto Mode are available. In Full Auto Mode, dialogue progression will no longer pause when story choices appear, allowing you to sit back and enjoy the narrative without interruption. If you encounter a choice that interests you, you can take manual control at any time and make your selection yourself, or alternatively, you can use Semi-Auto Mode for story progression.
      • Introduced a new Synthesis feature-Bioprinting. You may spend Regenerative Pistils to Bioprint collectible Resonator Ascension materials found within Jinzhou, the Black Shores, and Rinascita from previous versions. Regenerative Pistils can be obtained through the Oscillated Coral Store.
    • Beginner Experience Update
      • After the Version 3.5 update, new players who create their accounts will gain access to an updated beginner event system, along with a new set of newcomer rewards.
    • Interface Optimization
      • Following the Version 3.5 update, all material instances located in Jinzhou, the Black Shores and Rinascita are directly accessible via the Guidebook, without the need to unlock map marks first. Certain material instances within Lahai-Roi and Mengzhou are also accessible Guidebook after unlocking the corresponding map marks.
      • Refined the filtering system within the Guidebook tab, allowing for quicker location of target materials.
      • Added idle animation to the Echo display in the Echo Gallery.
    • Graphics Optimization
      • Added support for Intel XeSS 3 Frame Generation on PCs equipped with Intel graphics processors. If your device meets the system requirements, you can enable the feature through the settings menu after the update. Once activated, you can also adjust frame generation settings to achieve even higher frame rates.
    • Client Optimization
      • Introduced a resource compression technology for the PC client to further reduce the package size.
      • Refined the Resource Cleanup feature on mobile devices. Resource Cleanup will now support a wider range of completed instance resources, and a new Voice Resource cleanup option will be added to allow you to remove voice packs that are not currently in use.
    • Stay tuned to official announcements for updates on more optimizations.
  • New Outfits
    • Peppermint (Lynae)
    • Peach Parfail (Chisa)
  • New Expedition Motorbike Looks
    • Nightveil Piercer Premium Model
      • Purchasable from the Store.
    • Cloud Ride Chassis Mod
      • Obtainable from Main Quest.
  • New Accessory Bundles
    • Cloud Lark
      • Yangyang: Xuanling Accessory
    • Upon Rosy Clouds
      • Suisui-Accessory
    • Purrfect Pitch
      • Rover Custom Accessory
      • You can obtain Purrfect Pitch by redeeming To the New World Concert Ticket Redemption Code or by purchasing To the New World-World Tour Concert Pack from the Store.
      • The pack may become available at different times across the servers.
      • Please stay tuned for official announcements.
  • Special Events
    • Combat Event: Lament Recon: Tacet Crisis
    • 7-Day Login Event: Gifts of Aftertune
    • Area Exploration Event: A Glimpse of Xuanfang
    • Photo Collection Event: Shape of Yesterday
    • Combat Photography Event: Recaptured: Action Highlights
    • Featured Commission Event: Lollo Campaign: New Journey
    • Crisis Trial Challenge Event: Virtual Crisis: Quadrant Trials
    • Web Event: In Search of Lost Jade
  • New Echoes
    • Myriad Snare: Rustfire Chassis
    • Thousand-Puppet Pavilion
    • Fog Lionarch
    • Forbidden Bastion
    • Kernel Puppet: Joy
    • Kernel Puppet: Anger
    • Kernel Puppet: Worry
    • Kernel Puppet: Reflection
    • Kernel Puppet: Grief
    • Kernel Puppet: Fright
    • Aureate Picket
    • Porcelain Picket
    • Stone Picket
    • Smolder
    • Smiter
    • Fog Lionarch: Body
    • Fog Lionarch: Head
  • New Sonata Effects
    • Song of Feathered Trace
    • Heart of Evil’s Purge
    • Lamp of Nether Road
  • New Phantom Echoes
    • Phantom: Forbidden Bastion
    • Phantom: Smiter
  • New Tactical Hologram Challenge
    • Tactical Hologram: Denia
  • New Endstate Matrix Cycle
    • Endstate Matrix: Adversity Vanguard
  • New Resonators
    • Yangyang: Xuanling
    • Suisui
    • Rover: Electro
  • Upcoming Featured Resonator Convene
    • Phase I
      • Voices on Azure Feathers
      • Undefined Spectrum
      • When Winter Thaws
    • Phase II
      • Blessings From Dewy Winds
      • Take Flight in Spring
  • New Weapons
    • Azure Oath
    • Firstlight’s Herald
  • Upcoming Featured Weapon Convene
    • Phase I
      • Azure Oath
      • Spectrum Blaster
      • Daybreaker’s Spine
    • Phase II
      • Firstlight’s Herald
      • Everbright Polestar
  • Upcoming Reverb Convene
    • Starpath Reverbs: Reverb Resanator Convene
      • In the Reverb Resonator Convene event, you may select one of the available 5-Star Resonators as your Convene target. Both the target Resonator and target Weapon can be changed at any time. For more details about the Convene rules, please refer to the upcoming official announcements.
    • Tideforge Reverbs: Reverb Weapon Convene
      • In the Reverb Weapon Convene event, you may select one of the 5-Star Weapons as your Convene target. Both the target Resonator and target Weapon can be changed at any time. For more details about the Convene rules, please refer to the upcoming official announcements.
  • Event Information
    • Anime Expo 2026
      • From July 2 to 5 at Los Angeles Convention Center South Hall Booth SH-3720.
    • Official Panel at Anime Expo 2026
      • July 4 from 8:00 p.m. to 8:50 p.m. PT at JW Marriott Platinum Ballroom.
    • PlayStation 5 Deluxe Collection Pre-Orders
      • Pre-orders available July 5.
    • Escape from Duckov Collaboration Livery

Wuthering Waves is available now for PlayStation 5, PC via client download, Steam, and Epic Games Store, iOS via App Store, and Android via Google Play, and is coming to Xbox Series and PC via Microsoft Store on July 10.

Watch a new set of trailers below.

Xuanfang Trailer: Eisodus

English

Japanese

Korean

Version 3.5 Geographic Preview

English

Japanese

Korean

Records of Huanglong Tacet Discords: Land of Xuanfang

English

Japanese

Korean

Version 3.5 Special Broadcast

English

Japanese

Korean



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/wuthering-waves-version-3-5-update-blade-of-past-resounds-lingering-dream-hymns-launches-july-10-alongside-xbox-series-version
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: The Relic: First Guardian ‘Exploration Deep Dive’ trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

12 minutes of gameplay.

Publisher Perp Games and developer Project Cloud Games have released a 12-minute gameplay trailer for dark fantasy Soulslike action RPG The Relic: First Guardian.

Here is an overview of the game, via Perp Games:

About

In this action RPG, you embark on a heroic adventure to save the world.

The once-prosperous Arsiltus was swallowed up by the void created by the destruction of the great relic and transformed into a land of death. Now your mission is to find the pieces of the broken great relic and close the void.

Grow your character with various skills, solve the riddle of Arsiltus, and lead the world back to prosperity. You are the last hope of the Arsiltus.

Key Features

  • Explore the Relic – Adventure freely in the collapsed world of The Relic: First Guardian whilst following an exciting story, in this semi-open world action RPG. Enjoy the thrill of exploring an apocalyptic fantasy world and a variety of action-packed experiences.
  • Choose Your Own Playstyle – Choose from five different types of weapon options, of which form the basis of the action. Each weapon has its unique skills which can be changed according to your play style.
  • Solve the Riddle of Arsiltus – Embark on an adventure as a guardian to collect the pieces of the great relics and lead the world back to prosperity.
  • Character System – In The Relic: First Guardian, characters do not have levels. Instead runes, items, and crafting are used to strengthen your character. Complete dungeons and defeat bosses to expand your world and grow your character to the greatest potential.
  • Puzzle Solving – Players will need to solve riddles and gather relic pieces to restore the world to its former glory.

The Relic: First Guardian is due out for PlayStation 5 and PC via Steam on July 31, followed by Xbox Series and Switch 2l later this summer.

Watch the footage below.

Exploration Deep Dive



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/the-relic-first-guardian-exploration-deep-dive-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Sekiro: No Defeat ‘Preview’ trailer
item.content:encoded:
• Anime

Premieres on September 4 in Japan.

Kadokawa Corporation, Crunchyroll, Qzil.la, and ARCH have released a new trailer for Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice anime adaptation Sekiro: No Defeat.

Sekiro: No Defeat will premiere on September 4 in Japan with a three-week theatrical run. The anime will a;sp stream exclusively on Crunchyroll worldwide, excluding Japan, China, Korea, Russian, and Belarus.

Here is the story synopsis, via Crunchyroll:

Japan is fractured into many independent nations entangled in ceaseless war. At the center lies Ashina, a land of sacred earth and ancient mystery. Two decades after Sword Saint Isshin Ashina reclaimed the region in a brutal coup, a new threat emerges from within: The Interior Ministry. Desperate to protect his homeland, Isshin’s grandson Genichiro turns to forbidden powers. The only hope lies in a kidnapped boy—the Divine Heir—and his silent protector: a loyal shinobi known only as Sekiro.

This is the story of a lord and his retainer—and their quest to restore balance to a nation on the edge.

Watch the trailer below.

Preview Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/sekiro-no-defeat-preview-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road sixth free major update ‘Contenders for Glory DLC’ launches July 3
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Contenders gather in pursuit of glory.

LEVEL-5 will release Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road‘s sixth free major update, “Contenders for Glory DLC,” on July 3, the company announced.

Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam.

Watch a new trailer below.

Free Major Update “Contenders for Glory DLC” Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/inazuma-eleven-victory-road-sixth-free-major-update-contenders-for-glory-dlc-launches-july-3
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
